rationale: The proposed homestead exemption increase under Tax Code §11.13(b) has no bearing on the definition of "teacher" in Educ. Code §21.101, which addresses professional certification and contract eligibility.
quote: Sec. 21.101. DEFINITION. In this subchapter, "teacher" means a principal, supervisor, classroom teacher, school counselor, or other full-time professional employee who is required to hold a certificate issued under Subchapter B or a nurse.
_note: No relationship between proposed change and this rule text.
